highLevelOverview: Move all prettification behavior into src/core as a pure token-stream transform (tokens in, tokens out). Keep Lexical/paragraphing conversions in src/app as adapters, and keep saving/diffing/editor-refresh/notifications in a thin React hook orchestration layer.
goals: Core prettify is a pure function: token stream in → token stream out.
Core prettify is metadata-preserving (keeps sid/id/attributes/etc) and tolerant of unknown token types.
App provides pure adapters between Lexical serialized nodes and core token streams.
UI hook owns all app-specific orchestration: save dirty editor, progress reporting, diff updates, and editor content refresh.
nonGoals: Implementing new formatting features (beyond the existing chapter/book/project scopes).
technicalConstraints: Hexagonal architecture: src/core must not import from src/app or src/app/ui.
TypeScript strict mode; keep public APIs typed.
Keep conversions Lexical-specific in src/app (not core).
Minimize churn: prefer additive APIs + incremental migration, then remove legacy helpers.

tasks.title: Establish core prettify entrypoint
tasks.description: Ensure a single exported core prettifier is used everywhere and preserves unknown tokens and metadata.
acceptance: No imports from src/app in core prettify.
Unknown token types pass through unchanged.
Nested `content` is prettified recursively without losing metadata.

tasks.title: Add/strengthen core unit tests
tasks.description: Add unit tests validating whitespace normalization, malformed marker recovery, linebreak rules, and recursion.

tasks.title: Extract Lexical ⇄ token adapter helpers
tasks.description: Refactor `prettifySerializedNode.ts` into composable adapter functions so the prettify pipeline is assembled by the hook/orchestrator.
acceptance: Adapter exposes both directions: Lexical children → tokens and tokens → Lexical children.
Paragraph/root-shape wrapping remains in app domain (not in core).

tasks.title: Make prettify hook a thin orchestrator
tasks.description: Hook performs save/diff/notifications and calls adapter + core prettifier. Book/project are loops over chapter-level operations.
acceptance: Hook is the only layer that calls saveCurrentDirtyLexical/updateDiffMapForChapter/setEditorContent/notifications.
Book/project scopes are loops over chapter prettify.

tasks.title: Remove unused prettify helpers
tasks.description: Remove or deprecate legacy convenience helpers (e.g. applyPrettifyToNodeTree) once call sites are migrated.
